capital_action_classes: state-changing shell or SSH command against a capital service or host
vault or secret operation (read or write)
systemd or container restart of a capital service
rsync or scp into a capital surface
transaction, address, amount, session key, or signer command
manual advice the human will act on

kill_switch.capital_bypass: expiring break-glass record with written reason, human confirmation, and audit log entry

pre_arm_checklist: signing key provisioned outside the agent-writable workspace
